message:
[review-fix] Honor SQL chunk options index

Chunked SQL query/table readers accepted both SqlReadOptions::index_col and an explicit index_col parameter, but the indexed chunk wrappers ignored the option field when the explicit override was None. This made chunked reads diverge from the full-frame SQL helpers and silently returned RangeIndexes.

Use the explicit argument when present, otherwise fall back to options.index_col. Add query and table chunk regression tests that verify index promotion removes the id column and preserves parsed values.

Validation: git diff --check -- crates/fp-io/src/lib.rs; ubs crates/fp-io/src/lib.rs; rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-io; rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fp-io --all-targets -- -D warnings. cargo fmt --check -p fp-io reports broad pre-existing formatting drift in this large file, so this commit leaves unrelated formatting untouched.
